backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Board Saathi CBSE app, defining all data types (UserProfile, Chapter, MockTest, Flashcard, etc.) and persistent state maps for users, subjects, chapters, notes, questions, planner tasks, reminders, targets, mock tests, revision tasks, flashcards, and streaks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the Version 10 frontend visual/styling revert (sidebar colour, badge styling, widget overrides) is implemented in `frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx` with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarising each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details, serving as a reference for all pages and components in the Board Saathi React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and standard UI colour variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Board Saathi PWA, including viewport meta tags, PWA manifest link, iOS/Safari meta tags, favicon links, SEO/Open Graph tags, and the React root mount point.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Board Saathi, specifying app name, theme/background colours, display mode, orientation, icon set (180×180 to 512×512 including maskable), and education/productivity categories.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing cache-first for static assets and network-first for navigation, with pre-caching of critical shell assets, old cache cleanup on activate, and a SKIP_WAITING message handler for manual updates.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining all application routes (login, dashboard, planner, subjects, chapters, mock tests, progress, profile, pro, etc.) under an authenticated layout route that redirects unauthenticated users to `/login`.
frontend/src/components/ActiveTargetsSec: Displays a grid of active (incomplete) study targets with deadline status badges (Overdue/Due Soon/On Track) and allows marking them complete or navigating to the targets page.
frontend/src/components/AIAssistant.tsx: A floating chat widget component named 'Saathi' that answers user questions about the app by matching input against an FAQ utility, rendering responses with basic bold markdown support.
frontend/src/components/CalendarWidget.t: A popover calendar widget in the navbar that shows a live clock, current date, days remaining in the month, and a full calendar picker.
frontend/src/components/DailyView.tsx: Shows planner tasks for a specific date with the ability to add, toggle completion, and delete tasks via a dialog form and query hooks.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app shell with a responsive sidebar navigation, top bar with calendar widget, logout functionality, and an Outlet for nested routes.
frontend/src/components/MadeByDevBadge.t: A small static badge component displaying a 'Made by DEV' attribution label.
frontend/src/components/NotesSection.tsx: A notes panel for a given chapter that supports adding text and image notes, toggling image visibility, and deleting notes via query hooks.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: Renders a fixed bottom banner prompting users to install the PWA, with install and dismiss actions powered by the usePWAInstall hook.
frontend/src/components/QuestionsSection: Displays a form to add Q&A pairs and a collapsible list of existing questions for a given chapter, using React Query mutations for add/delete operations.
frontend/src/components/QuoteOfTheDayCar: Shows a styled card with a daily motivational quote fetched from a utility function, rendered with a gradient background.
frontend/src/components/StreakCard.tsx: Displays the user's current and top study streak with a flame icon, and shows earned milestone badges for 3, 7, and 30-day streaks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and status tracking via AuthClient, exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Manages PWA install prompt state, tracking the deferred browser install event, dismissed status (persisted in localStorage), and installed state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend data fetching and mutations (profiles, subjects, chapters, notes, questions, streaks, etc.) plus localStorage helpers for reminders and targets.
frontend/src/hooks/useReminderAlarm.ts: Provides play, preview, and stop functions for reminder alarm sounds using the Web Audio API, with a mapping of available sound files.
A React hook that schedules browser notifications 5 minutes before reminders and plays alarm sounds at the exact reminder time, using setTimeout and a session-level Set to avoid duplicate scheduling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Nunito and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's teal-and-orange color palette along with utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: A static informational page that documents all app features (Subjects, Flashcards, Mock Tests, Planner, Targets, Reminders, Revision, Question Bank, Progress Tracker) with descriptions and usage tips displayed as cards.
frontend/src/pages/AttemptMockTestPage.t: A page for taking a mock test that displays MCQ questions one at a time with an elapsed timer, tracks selected answers, and submits them to the backend before navigating to the report page.
frontend/src/pages/ChaptersPage.tsx: A page that lists chapters for a given subject, allows adding new chapters with name and weightage, and supports toggling chapter completion which triggers spaced-repetition revision scheduling.
frontend/src/pages/CreateMockTestPage.ts: A form page for creating a new MCQ mock test, allowing the user to set a test name, select a subject, and add/remove questions with four options and a correct answer before submitting to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a greeting, study streak banner, stats grid (chapters, tasks, targets, mock tests), motivational quote, and active targets section using data from various query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/FlashcardsPage.tsx: Flashcards page that lets users view, filter by subject, add, flip, mark as learned, and delete flashcards using a card flip UI and query/mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Authentication page supporting Internet Identity login and new user registration, with guest mode fallback and redirect to dashboard on successful auth.
frontend/src/pages/MockTestsPage.tsx: Mock tests listing page that displays all created MCQ tests with attempt history and best scores, and provides navigation to create, take, or view reports for each test.
frontend/src/pages/MyAchievementsPage.ts: Achievements page showing the user's rank, personal best stats, study streak, and earned badges using gradient cards and data from multiple query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/PlannerPage.tsx: A monthly calendar planner page that fetches tasks for the viewed month, displays task counts per day, and opens a DailyView dialog when a day is clicked.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: A user profile page that displays and allows editing of name, school, and class fields, with support for saving to the backend, logout, and a PWA update check.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: A progress tracker page showing overview stats (tasks, targets, test scores), subject-wise chapter completion progress bars, and a list of recent mock test attempts.
frontend/src/pages/ProUpgradePage.tsx: A static marketing page for the Board Saathi Pro upgrade, displaying a pricing card (₹299/year) and a grid of six premium features with a placeholder payment button.
frontend/src/pages/QuestionBankPage.tsx: A question bank page with subject and chapter filter dropdowns that fetches and lists questions, each with a toggleable answer reveal card.
frontend/src/pages/RemindersPage.tsx: Page for managing study reminders with add/delete functionality, alarm sound preview/selection, and optional linking to active targets.
frontend/src/pages/RevisionPage.tsx: Page displaying pending and completed spaced-repetition revision tasks with due date status indicators and checkbox completion toggling.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: Page listing subjects with chapter completion progress bars, allowing users to add new subjects and navigate to subject details.
frontend/src/pages/TargetsPage.tsx: Page for managing study targets with deadline tracking, supporting add, complete/incomplete toggle, and delete operations.
frontend/src/pages/TestReportPage.tsx: Page showing the latest mock test attempt report with score, percentage, time taken, and a summary of all previous attempts for that test.
frontend/src/utils/faqMatcher.ts: Defines a FAQ database with keyword arrays and response strings covering all major app features, used to match user queries to predefined help responses.
frontend/src/utils/localStorageService.t: Provides typed localStorage helpers for persisting and retrieving user profile, reminders, and targets data in the Board Saathi app.
frontend/src/utils/quotesData.ts: Exports an array of motivational quotes and a `getQuoteOfTheDay` function that selects a quote based on the day of the year.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for sensitive values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animations, with dark mode and plugin support.
project_state.json: Tracks project state metadata for a task to revert frontend visual/styling changes (sidebar colours, badge styling, widget colour overrides) introduced in version 10 back to their prior state.
